case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. CRISTIAN GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION RE: 1. INTEREST 2. CCP 1033 (B)(2) NOTICE 3. REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
